content_angle: The six-beat kick — most club swimmers default to a two-beat kick in training and leave measurable speed on the table. Research shows intermediate swimmers cut 10%+ off their 50m times in just four weeks of dedicated six-beat kick training. A practical drill-based post with a surprising stat hook.
key_insight: Six-beat kick training produced a 10.21% reduction in 50m time trial performance for intermediate swimmers after just four weeks — a concrete, surprising stat that makes an excellent scroll-stopping hook and saves-worthy educational post.
